title: Cuneiform Tablet #0769: Neo-Assyrian Divinatory
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Neo-Assyrian period — a divinatory document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Neo-Assyrian period — a divinatory document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Neo-Assyrian period. Divinatory document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records divinatory matters typical of Neo-Assyrian period administrative or literary practice.
